none.justification: Answer A correctly found the 59 bare `#include "eloop.h"` `.c` files and correctly identified no bare-header transitive include, but it missed the 58 additional direct includers using `#include "utils/eloop.h"`, which the GT explicitly treats as the same physical header. The GT caps this 59-only result at 2/3.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B gives the GT count of 117 and its file list matches the union of the 59 bare includes plus 58 `utils/eloop.h` includes. It also correctly reports that no header re-exports `eloop.h`, so the transitive closure adds zero files.

lsp.justification: Answer C correctly reports the 59 bare-spelling unique `.c` files and notes the duplicate include in `driver_atheros.c`, but it misses the alternate `utils/eloop.h` spelling that contributes 58 more direct includers. Its conclusion that the full dependent set is 59 is therefore incomplete under the GT rubric.
